topic_text: When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Close garage door using Garageio. If it starts raining, make sure that your garage is closed. If the current weather conditions change to rain, this Applet will close your garage door if it's open.
When Temperature rises above from Nest Thermostat, do Switch on using SmartThings. Turn on fan before the A/C. Great way to get air circulating before having to turn on the A/C.

When Oven turned on from GE Appliances Cooking, do Blink lights using Philips Hue. Flash your Phillips Hue lights when your oven turns on. Is someone baking cookies? Keep tabs on your oven by flashing your lights anytime someone turns on the oven.

When Oven turned on from GE Appliances Cooking, do Turn on fan for 15 minutes using Nest Thermostat. Signal your Nest thermostat to turn on the HVAC fan when your oven is on. When your oven turns on, your Nest Thermostat will activate the HVAC system fan to help circulate air.

When A device is turned off from HomeSeer, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. Synchronize a HomeSeer virtual device with a product (in this case, a WeMo powered table lamp). This recipe allows HomeSeer to control a WeMo switch module. It can be easily adapted to control any other IFTTT partner device as well. To create the trigger, add a HomeSeer virtual device and name it "WeMo table lamp" (or whatever you wish). Then, use this recipe to turn the WeMo switch off when the HomeSeer virtual device is turned off. Now, create a corresponding recipe to turn the WeMo switch on when the HomeSeer virtual device is turned on. Once this is done, you can add the HomeSeer virtual device to any HomeSeer event you like and these two IFTTT recipes will function as a "bridge" to control the WeMo device.
